name: DingTalk Open Platform
description: Alibaba DingTalks developer platform for mini-apps, robots and custom automations on Chinas top enterprise IM.

seo.title: DingTalk Open Platform — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: DingTalk Open Platform: Alibaba DingTalks developer platform for mini-apps, robots and custom automations on Chinas top enterprise IM.

when_to_use: Custom DingTalk robot for internal alert notifications
Mini-app for expense approvals inside enterprise DingTalk
Automating HR workflows via DingTalk API for China teams
Third-party system integration into China's top enterprise IM
CRM update triggers sent as DingTalk bot messages to sales

cons: Complex approval flows for publishing apps
Account and org model unfamiliar to Western devs
Data residency tied to mainland China
review.verdict: Essential if you ship to Chinese enterprises, largely irrelevant elsewhere.
review.best_for: Teams building apps or bots for Chinese enterprise customers on DingTalk.
review.not_for: Global SaaS teams without a China market presence.
